query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT id, 'Reading Comprehension Strategies', 'Learn techniques to understand main ideas, supporting details, and author''s purpose. Practice identifying tone, bias, and inference in texts.', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Vocabulary in Context', 'Develop skills to determine word meanings from context clues. Learn prefixes, suffixes, and root words to expand vocabulary.', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Grammar Fundamentals', 'Master sentence structure, parts of speech, and basic grammar rules. Understand subjects, predicates, and sentence types.', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Punctuation and Mechanics', 'Learn correct use of commas, semicolons, colons, apostrophes, and other punctuation marks. Understand capitalization rules.', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Writing Process and Organization', 'Develop skills in planning, drafting, revising, and editing. Learn to organize ideas logically and create coherent paragraphs.', 5, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Argumentative Writing', 'Learn to construct arguments with evidence, counterarguments, and logical reasoning. Understand persuasive techniques and how to support claims.', 6, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Literary Analysis', 'Analyze themes, characters, plot, and literary devices in fiction. Learn to interpret symbolism and author''s craft.', 7, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Informational Text Analysis', 'Understand how to analyze non-fiction texts, identify key information, and evaluate credibility of sources.', 8, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LA';
